headline: Bitcoin Nears $63.5K Ahead of Weekly Close

article.title: Bitcoin nears $63.5K into weekly close as trader warns of 'terrible' Monday
article.summary: Bitcoin reached its highest levels in nearly a fortnight over the weekend, but BTC price action faced an "absolutely terrible" Monday track record.

headline: SA Proposes Crypto Tax Rules Under Existing Code

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax guidance under existing framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: NYC Flood Risk Spikes 30% on Storm Surge

article.title: New York Thunderstorms Raise Flood Risk as Heat Dissipates
article.summary: New York City will have a cooler, soggier Sunday now that the massive heat dome across the US East that taxed power grids and snarled transit has started to crack, while lingering high temperatures in Washington and across the Mid-Atlantic triggered air quality warnings.

article.title: EasyJet Agrees to Castlelake’s £5.2 Billion Takeover Offer
article.summary: EasyJet Plc has agreed in principle to a fifth takeover offer from Castlelake LP for £6.90 per share in cash, the companies said in a statement Sunday.

headline: $100M Crypto Assets At Risk From Mac Malware Threat

headline: Bitcoin ETFs Sink 8th Week Despite $100M Inflow

article.summary: Hyperliquid ETFs took in $4.3 million, their smallest week since launching in May, down from a record $111 million the week before.
